During the [[Stenax Massacres]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the [[Stenax]] [[Species/Legends|species]] '''invaded''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tharkos]], wresting control of the world from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as they did to many worlds throughout the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]].

==The battle==
It was an attack made by the [[Stenax]]. The Stenax had wiped out [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] installations on Stenos and seized the Imperials' military technology, which they used to attack many [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] worlds, including [[Tharkos]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was able to turn the tide against the Stenax onslaught, after an intense battle near the planet.

{{Battle-stub}}
